title: CPPManager KNIME workflow
author: Wedler, Marlene
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This is a   KNIME workflow to analyze Cell Painting PLUS (CPP) datasets. The use of this pipeline is described in detail in Wedler et al., (2026):  Cell Painting PLUS: An iterative staining-elution protocol for high-content phenotypic screenings  (Current Protocols, doi:10.1002/cpz1.70368).  
 Version v1.0.0 : for KNIME 5.4 and described in Wedler et al., (2026):  Cell Painting PLUS: An iterative staining-elution protocol for high-content phenotypic screenings  (Current Protocols, doi:10.1002/cpz1.70368)
steps_raw:
